chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-762 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.9555/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on M.A. No.9556/2020. 28.03.2022 Miss. Samreen Pirzada, advocate for the applicant. == The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant criminal miscellaneous application are that the applicant by making allegation of criminal intimidation and use of criminal force, lodged F.I.R against Waqas Memon with P.S Cantt Hyderabad, it was recommended by the police for disposal under ‘NC’ Class and it was disposed off accordingly by learned Consumer Protection Court/CJ & JM, Hyderabad, vide order dated 23.11.2020, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application under section 561-A Cr.P.C. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the learned trial Magistrate has passed the impugned order in slipshod manner, therefore, it is liable to be set-aside. Heard arguments and perused the record. The FIR of the incident has been lodged with delay of more than two months; such delay could not be overlooked. The parties are already disputed on civil side. On due investigation, the F.I.R of the incident was recommended by the police for disposal under ‘NC’ Class and it has rightly been disposed of as such by learned Trial Magistrate, by way of impugned order, which is not found to be illegal to be interfered with by this Court; consequently the instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications.

The parties are already disputed on civil side. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
